evals.prompt: Transcribe this 45-minute product strategy meeting recording and create a structured summary with action items, key decisions, and open questions. The file is at /tmp/strategy-meeting-2026-03-01.mp3
evals.expected_output: A structured meeting summary document with transcript, executive summary, action items, decisions, and open questions
expectations: Output checks for transcription tool availability before proceeding
Output produces a structured Markdown document
Output includes an executive summary section
Output extracts and lists action items with owners if mentioned
Output captures key decisions made during the meeting
Output includes open questions or follow-ups

evals.prompt: I have a voice memo from a customer interview (interview-customer-acme-2026-02-28.m4a). Transcribe it and format it as a research interview snapshot with key insights, quotes, and themes.
evals.expected_output: A formatted interview snapshot with transcript and structured insights extraction
expectations: Output formats the result as an interview snapshot (not just raw transcript)
Output extracts notable quotes from the customer
Output identifies key themes or insights from the interview
Output is saved as a structured Markdown document
